CSP ka kahna hai ki unka ek CX hai jinka migration kiya gaya hai. CSP ka kahna hai ki wo CX ko migrate kar rahe hain, lekin CX ka number kho gaya hai. Isiliye CSP puch rahe hain ki number change kaise hoga. Maine CSP ko bata diya hai ki CX ko Customer Care mein call karne ke liye boliye, wahan se number change ho jayega.
tickets.remarks: Not providing info & disconnected

tickets.question: CSP ka kahna hai ki bata dijiye device free hai ya use mein hai. Maine CSP ko bata diya hai ki Net Box ka recharge khatam hone ke 2 din baad wo dobara use hone ke liye eligible ho jata hai, aur uske baad aap use kar sakte hain.

CSP ka kahna hai ki wo form bhar rahe hain, lekin unko issue aa raha hai. Wahan show ho raha hai ki Aapka optical power range mein nahi hai. Maine check kiya hai ki CSP ka optical power high hai (-27). Maine CSP ko bata diya hai ki pehle optical power sahi kijiye, uske baad Net Box mein jo frequent disconnection ka issue hai, wo bhi resolve ho jayega.
CSP ko New CSP App ka link chahiye tha. Maine unhe WhatsApp par send kar diya hai.

CSP ka kahna hai ki unke wallet se payment nahi nikal pa raha hai. Maine CSP ko bata diya hai ki aap payment sirf Wednesday, Friday aur Sunday ko nikal paayenge. Lekin CSP ka voice issue tha, maine 2 baar call kiya, par CSP ki awaaz nahi aa rahi thi.
tickets.remarks: PX ka resolution nhi hua h abhi tak.

tickets.question: csp ka khena hai ki mai new connection par hu installation ke liye but insatllation aage nh bad paa raha ahi

CSP ka kehna hai ki unko kuch CX ki details chahiye. Maine unko guide kiya hai ki woh apne app mein NET BOX section mein jaakar details check kar sakti hain. Lekin CSP ko meri voice nahi aayi aur call cut ho gaya. Dobara call aaya to woh Harish ke paas connect ho gaya hai.

CSP ka kahna hai ki unka CX hai jinka recharge check karna hai. Maine unhe bata diya hai ki wo apne Net Box mein jaakar dekh sakte hain. Nahi to jab CX recharge karega, to unko payout aa jayega. Aap apne app mein hi check kar sakte hain.
CSP ko NET BOX replacement form chahiye.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unke CX ne recharge kiya hai aur woh jaana chahte the ki uska payout kahan dikhai dega. Maine CSP ko on-call guide kar diya hai. Unke app mein issue resolve ho gaya hai aur CSP ne confirm bhi kar diya hai.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unka app login nahi ho raha tha aur permission ka issue aa raha tha. Maine CSP ko guide kar diya hai. Ab unka app login ho gaya hai aur CSP ne confirm kiya hai ki issue resolve ho gaya hai.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unke CX ka service TT aaya hua tha, jise woh close nahi kar pa rahe the. Maine CSP ko guide kar diya hai. Unhone confirm kiya ki TT close ho gayi hai aur uske baad call cut kar diya.
CSP ka kehna hai ki unka CX ka NET BOX change kiya tha, uska status bata do. Maine check kiya hai, woh already approved hai, woh maine unko bata diya hai.

CSP ka kehna hai ki woh payment withdraw karna chahte hain, lekin payment withdraw nahi ho raha hai. Maine CSP ko bata diya hai ki naye system ke anusaar wallet se raashi sirf Wednesday, Friday aur Sunday ko withdraw ki ja sakti hai, aur ek din mein sirf ek baar withdrawal kiya ja sakta hai. CSP ko iski jankari de di gayi hai.
CSP ka kehna hai ki unhe Technician App chahiye tha. Technician App ka link CSP ko WhatsApp par bhej diya gaya hai.
CSP ka kehna hai ki unhe Net Box Replacement karna hai, isliye unhe form chahiye tha. Net Box Replacement Form CSP ko send kar diya gaya hai.
CSP ko app ka link chahiye tha. Link unhe send kar diya gaya hai.
CSP ka app login issue permissions ki wajah se tha. CSP ko guide kar diya gaya hai aur ab app successfully login ho gaya hai. CSP ne khud confirm kiya hai ki unka issue resolve ho gaya hai.
Jo slot app me show hota hai usi samay ke andar installation complete karni hoti hai. Agar given time slot me installation complete nahi hoti, to lead system se automatically remove ho jati hai.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unka ek CX out-of-area ka hai aur CSP us lead ko remove karna chahte the. Call ko hold par rakhne ke baad CSP ne bataya ki unhone lead ko remove kar liya hai. Lead successfully remove ho gayi hai, isliye call disconnect kar di gayi.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unka ek CX hai jinka installation aaya hai. CX ke account mein â¹300 charge dikh raha hai aur woh pooch rahe hain ki yeh kis baat ka charge hai.  CSP ko guide kar diya gaya hai ki ismein â¹100 booking charge aur â¹300 security deposit hota hai. Iske baad 2 din ka trial period milta hai. Trial ke baad CX apni zarurat ke anusar jitne din chahein recharge kar sakte hain.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unka ek CX hai jise dobara recharge karwana hai. CX ka mobile number purana hi hai, lekin woh apna registered number change karna chahte hain. CSP ko bata diya gaya hai ki CX ko number change karwane ke liye Customer Care par call karna hoga.
CSP ka kehna hai ki unke area mein outage chal raha hai. Kripya CX ko suchit kar dijiye ki ve is sambandh mein TT darj na karein.
CSP ka kehna hai ki unke ek CX ka internet disconnect ho gaya hai. Issue check karne ke liye Net Box ki requirement batayi gayi thi. CSP ne inform kiya hai ki woh kuch time baad dobara call karenge.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unka ek CX hai jo naya connection lena chahta hai. CSP jaan-na chahte the ki naye connection ke liye kya-kya changes aur process rahega. CSP ko poori jankari de di gayi hai. Saath hi unhe Wiom Channel Partner Portal par jaane aur uska use karne ke liye bhi guide kar diya gaya hai.
CSP ko app mein Parmesan ka issue aa raha tha, maine unhe bataya kaise Parmesan allow karna hai.c
CSP ka kehna hai ki unka ek CX hai jinki lead aa gayi hai, lekin slot book nahi ho raha tha. Baad mein CSP ne bataya ki unka slot add ho gaya hai aur uske baad call disconnect kar diya.
CSP ko app mein jaana hai ki unka wallet kahaan hai.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unka CX hai jinka lead aaya hai, lekin wo app se call nahi lag raha. Maine CSP ko on-call guide kiya, unhone CX ko call kiya aur mera call cut kar diya. Maine call back kiya, lekin unhone call receive nahi kiya.
csp ko link caahiye the app ka

Expert App mein login issue aa raha hai. Maine technician ko Expert App ka link login karne ke liye send kiya tha. Main call par rehkar unhe login karwane ki koshish kar raha tha, lekin technician ne call disconnect kar di. Iske baad maine 2 baar callback kiya, par technician ne call receive nahi ki aur koi response bhi nahi diya.
CSP ka kehna hai ki unka stake rate 85 hai, to kya bones mil jayenge? Maine bataya hai ki agar 80+ hota hai, to aapko mil jaata hai.

CSP keh rahe hain ki unka ek CX ka netbox change ho raha hai aur wahan optical power zyada aa raha hai. Maine check kiya hai ki netbox mein -(-28.239038 dBm) hai. Maine CSP se kaha hai ki aap optical power sahi karein, tabhi netbox mein internet ki light aayegi, kyunki optical power sahi honi chahiye jab netbox change kiya ja raha ho.
CSP ka kehna hai ki unka app login nahi ho raha hai. Maine app ko login kar diya hai.

CSP keh rahe hain ki unka CX hai jinhone recharge kiya hai, lekin unka payout abhi tak nahi aaya. Maine CSP ko bata diya hai ki unka payout aa chuka hai, wo check kar sakte hain. Issue resolve ho gaya hai, CSP ne confirm kiya hai.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unhe app login mein issue aa raha hai. Maine unhe bola hai WhatsApp par message karne ke liye, aur main unhe link send kar deta hu. Unka kehna hai ki wo WhatsApp download karke message karenge.
tickets.remarks: PX ka resolution nhi hua h abhi tak.

tickets.question: CSP keh rahe hain ki unka customer hai jinka number kho gaya hai aur unhe number change karna hai. Maine customer ko CX care ka number de diya hai, unse kehna hai ki CX care par call karein.
CSP keh rahe hain ki unka CX hai jinka recharge hua hai lekin payout nahi aaya. Maine check kiya, CX ne recharge nahi kiya hai, maine unhe guide kar diya hai.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unka ek CX hai jo jaanana chahta hai ki recharge hua hai ya nahi, kyunki CX ke app mein recharge nahi dikh raha. Maine unhe bata diya hai ki jo app mein dikh raha hai, wo aap CX ko recharge karne ke liye bata dijiye.
CSP keh rahe hain ki unhe bank address form chahiye. Uske baad CSP ne mujhe bola ki unhone 2-3 din pehle maanga tha aur unhe form mil gaya hai, phir CSP ne call cut kar diya.
tickets.remarks: PX ka resolution nhi hua h abhi tak.

tickets.question: CSP ka kehna hai ki unke customer ka net box replacement form bhara tha, lekin ab tak approve nahi hua tha. Maine approve kar diya hai, CSP ka issue resolve ho gaya hai.

CSP keh rahe hain ki unka ek CX hai jinka app mein dikh raha hai ki unka account suspend ho gaya hai. CSP ka kehna hai ki aap bata dijiye ye kya hai. Maine unhe bataya ki unka connection band ho gaya hai kyunki unka net box free show ho raha hai. Maine CSP ko bola ki CX ko bata dijiye ki wo net connection le sakte hain. Lekin CSP keh rahe hain ki CX care call receive nahi kar rahe. Aap bata dijiye booking kaise karni hogi. Maine CX ko call par samjha diya hai kaise connection lena hai, unhone ka
tickets.remarks: PX ka resolution nhi hua h abhi tak.

tickets.question: CSP keh rahe hain ki unke Vijay Bihar ke kai CX hain jo zyada educate nahi hain aur wo WIOM ka plan sahi se nahi samajh paate, is wajah se wo humse ladai karte hain. Main aapko feedback de raha hu ki inhe thoda sahi se plan ki jaankari deni chahiye, jaise 100 ka booking, 300 security aur 2 din ka trial hai. Iske baad wo recharge kar sakte hain.
CSP ka kehna hai ki unhe status jaana hai ki net box ka replacement approve hua hai ya nahi.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unka customer hai jinka net box ka pickup chahiye. Maine guide kar diya hai ki ticket system ke through banayi jaati hai. Recharge khatam hone ke 15 din baad system ke through aata hai, lekin aap is net box ko use kar sakte hain kyunki recharge khatam hone ke 2 din baad ye use ke liye eligible ho jaata hai.

CSP keh rahe hain ki unka CS hai jinhone kal recharge kiya, lekin CX ke app mein dikh raha hai ki recharge khatam ho gaya hai. Maine CSP ko bola ki wo CX se puchhein unhone kitne din ka recharge kiya hai. CSP ne bataya ki unhone 1 din ka recharge kiya hai. Maine unhe recharge karne ke liye keh diya aur call cut kar diya.
CSP keh rahe hain ki mere area mein outage tha, jiske wajah se kaafi T aa chuki hai aur mera SLA bhi down ho gaya hai. CSP ka kehna hai ki aap bataiye kya karna hai.

Technician ko expert app chahiye. Unka kehna hai ki wo login nahi kar pa rahe hain aur trust line par call karne ka option aa raha hai. Maine CSP ko link bhej diya hai aur app download karne ke liye keh diya hai, lekin technician ne confirm nahi kiya hai ki app download ho gaya.
CSP keh rahe hain ki unka CX hai jinka net box configure ho raha hai, unhe IP chahiye. Maine IP send kar diya hai, aur CSP ne confirm kiya hai ki mera IP net box ke page par login ho gaya hai
CSP ko net box change karna hai, isliye unko form chahiye.
CSP ko apne net box replacement form ka status jaana tha ki approve hua hai ya nahi.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unka ek CX hai jiska net box pickup TT aaya tha aur net box mein recharge tha. Ab CX keh rahe hain ki unhe net box ka pickup nahi karna. Isliye unhone unhe bataya hai ki agar wo recharge karna chahte hain, to want to recharge par click karke TT ko remove kar sakte hain.

CSP keh rahe hain ki unhe IP chahiye login karne ke liye, kyunki unke paas jo ID thi wo galat thi. Maine template bhej diya hai aur unhone confirm kiya hai ki mera login ho gaya hai aur IP page bhi open ho gaya hai.
CSP ka kehna hai ki unhe login karne ke liye IP chahiye. Maine unhe template bhej diya hai, aur CSP ne confirm kiya hai ki unhe mil gaya hai.
CSP keh rahe hain ki unka ek customer hai jo net box lene ke liye mana kar raha hai kyunki ab customer ka net chalne laga hai. Unka kehna hai ki mai use karunga, ab WiFi to aap ticket hata do.

CSP keh rahe hain ki unka ek CX hai jiska lead aaya hua hai. CX ne bola ki aap mujhe process bata dijiye. CSP ne process bata diya, lekin ab CX keh raha hai ki wo decide karega lagana hai ya nahi. CSP ko bola gaya ki aap thoda wait kijiye aur baad mein try kijiye. Agar CX lagane se mana karte hain, toh aap lead par jaakar 3 dots par click karke lead ko remove kar sakte hain. CSP ne okay bol kar call cut kar di.

tickets.question: CSP ka kehna hai ki unka customer hai jiska ID unhone diya. Customer ne kaha ki recharge kiya tha, lekin payout kisi aur net box ka aaya tha. CSP ne mujhe ID diya aur bola ki confirm karun. Maine confirm kiya ki yehi hai. CSP ne kaha ki unhe confusion tha, lekin wo clear ho gaya aur bola ki unka koi issue nahi hai, phir thank you bol kar call cut kar diya.
CSP keh rahe hain ki unhe net box replacement aur maintenance form chahiye.

CSP keh rahe hain ki unka ek CX ka new installation karne aaye hain. Unka kehna hai ki CX ne 100 rupaye ka booking aur 300 ka security pay kar diya hai. Ab aage ka process kya hai, yeh batayein. Maine CSP ko guide kiya hai ki 100 booking ka hota hai aur 300 security ka. Iske baad Wiom ki taraf se 2 din ka trial milta hai. Uske baad CX apni marzi se 1, 7, ya 28 din ka recharge kar sakte hain. Aapko ISP se 100 Mbps ka 30 din ka recharge karna hai, jiska fixed payout 300 per active customer milega.

CSP ka kehna hai ki unko IP chahiye net box ko login karne ke liye. Maine WhatsApp pe bheja, lekin CSP keh rahe hain ki mere phone mein internet hai. Maine text message bhi kiya, par unka kehna hai nahi aaya, isliye maine unko verbally bata diya.
CSP ka kehna hai ki net box replacement ka process bata dijiye. Maine form bhej diye hain, CSP ko bola hai ki form bhar dijiye, agar koi issue aata hai to batana.
